zh.lifeSummary: 當Knud Lavard於大約1096年出生時，他的父親Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark11094歲，母親Boedil Thurgotsdatter42歲。他於1116年與Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1131年1月7日在丹麥維斯亞藍德林斯泰德哈拉爾德斯泰德享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Knud Lavard于大约1096年出生时，他的父亲Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark11094岁，母亲Boedil Thurgotsdatter42岁。他于1116年与Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1131年1月7日在丹麦維斯亞藍德林斯泰德哈拉爾德斯泰德享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lavard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): habitational name from Haverfordwest (Pembrokeshire), from Old English hæfer ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’.
English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): in some cases, the name may also be a variant of   Hereford  .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hahward, composed of the elements hah, which is unexplained, and ward ‘guard’.

variants.name: Harvard
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Havard  .

History: John Harvard (1607–38), who gave his name to Harvard College, was the son of a London butcher. He inherited considerable property, and emigrated to MA in 1637. On his death he bequeathed half his estate and the whole of his library to the newly founded college at Cambridge, MA.

variants.name: Avard
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): from the Middle English personal name Averd or Award, shortened forms of Old English Ælfweard.
French: variant of   Havard   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Hereford
meanings: English: habitational name from Hertford (Hertfordshire) (in which the t was lost early, as in the modern pronunciation Harford), Hereford (Herefordshire), or Harford (Devon, Gloucestershire). The Devon and Herefordshire placenames derive from Old English here ‘army’ + ford ‘ford’, while the Gloucestershire and Hertfordshire placenames derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + ford.

nameMeanings.name: Knud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Knud Lavard was born about 1096, his father, Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark, was 11094 and his mother, Boedil Thurgotsdatter, was 42. He married Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark in 1116. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 7 January 1131, in Haraldsted, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Denmark, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knud Lavard est né environ 1096, son père, Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark, avait 11094 ans et sa mère, Boedil Thurgotsdatter, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark en 1116. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1131, à Haraldsted, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Danemark, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Knud Lavard um 1096 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark 11094 und seine Mutter Boedil Thurgotsdatter 42. Er hat 1116 Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1131 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Haraldsted, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Knud Lavard è nato il circa 1096, il suo padre, Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark, aveva 11094 anni e il suo madre, Boedil Thurgotsdatter, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark nel 1116. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1131, nel Haraldsted, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Danimarca, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Knud Lavardが約1096年に生まれた時，父Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmarkは11094歳，母Boedil Thurgotsdatterは42歳であった。1116年にIngeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1131年1月7日にデンマークベストスジaeランドリングステドハーアルドステドで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Knud Lavard(이)가 대략 1096년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark(은)는 11094세였고, 그의 어머니 Boedil Thurgotsdatter(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1116년 Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 1월 7일 덴마크 베스츠제이ae랜드 링스테드 하럴드스테드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Knud Lavard nasceu aproximadamente 1096, seu pai, Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark, tinha 11094 anos e sua mãe, Boedil Thurgotsdatter, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark em 1116. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1131, em Haraldsted, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knud Lavard родился около 1096 г., его отцу по имени Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark было 11094 года, а матери, которую звали Boedil Thurgotsdatter, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark в 1116 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 7 января 1131 г. в местности харальдстед, рингстед, весцджaeлланд, Дания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Knud Lavard nació aproximadamente 1096, su papá, Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark, tenía 11094 años y su mamá, Boedil Thurgotsdatter, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Ingeborga Mstislavsdatter (Mstislavna) of Novgorod/Kiev, Queen of Denmark en 1116. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1131, en Haraldsted, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, a la edad de 36 años.
